units.source_text: 1  「使合約服務收益出現調整的估算變動」增加6億美元（2024年：增加9億美元），包括來⾃經濟因素的增額10億美元（2024年：增額7億美元）和來⾃非經濟因
units.translation_target_text: 1 “Estimate changes that would adjust contracted services revenue” increased by US$600 million (2024: an increase of US$900 million), including an increase of US$1.0 billion from economic factors (2024: an increase of US$700 million) and non-economic factors.
units.translation_en: 1 “Estimate changes that would adjust contracted services revenue” increased by US$600 million (2024: an increase of US$900 million), including an increase of US$1.0 billion from economic factors (2024: an increase of US$700 million) and non-economic factors.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 “Estimate changes that would adjust contracted services revenue” increased by US$600 million (2024: an increase of US$900 million), including an increase of US$1.0 billion from economic factors (2024: an increase of US$700 million) and non-economic factors.

units.source_text: 素的減額4億美元（2024年：增額3億美元）。
units.translation_target_text: A reduction of USD 400 million for the factor (2024: an increase of USD 300 million).
units.translation_en: A reduction of USD 400 million for the factor (2024: an increase of USD 300 million).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence
